businessListResponses.fullOverview: Heating, Ventilation, Air Conditioning and Refrigeration systems for the offshore industry, the navy, yachting, and merchant shipping industry. heinen &hopman eng. Starting out as subcontractor for mainly central heating installations, the company rapidly grew to become an expert in the field of designing, engineering and installing heating, ventilation, air-conditioning and cooling (HVAC) systems on both land and sea. The company has provided numerous vessels with excellent HVAC&R systems for the navy, the merchant shipping industry, the offshore industry and the yachting industry. Heinen & Hopman is renowned for customized HVAC systems that provide solutions for any of the clients'​ challenges. Heinen & Hopman provides innovative HVAC solutions worldwide for navy ships, yachts and superyachts, the merchant sector and the offshore industry. World leader in marine HVAC systems since 1965. Innovativeness and bespoke HVAC solutions are key in satisfying our clients in the marine and offshore industry. Heinen & Hopman | Marine & Offshore HVAC.

businessListResponses.fullOverview: Heinen & Hopman Air Conditioning L. L. C. (formerly known as Carea Air Conditioning Services LLC. (CASP)), established in Dubai since 1988, offers complete and tailor-made HVAC systems for marine, offshore, oil & gas, renewables, yachts, navy & industrial. Our team of highly qualified industry professionals are able to handle any size of projects from small to large scale and follow the best practices in project management, such as PMBOK, offering world class HVAC products and solutions not only in the Middle East (Bahrain, Kuwait, Oman, Saudi-Arabia, and UAE) but worldwide. Company also have a dedicated team for maintenance, repair, overhaul and upgrade of HVAC &R systems onboard any type of client assets supported by inhouse compressor overhauling facility . Company provides one stop solution for clients HVAC &R needs starting from FEED all the way up to after sales and warranty.

businessListResponses.fullOverview: Protec Group is a company at Japan,Fax is 60378457995 (+81-60378457995),Address is Shah Alam Protec Group, A Basic Manufacturer Of Ignition Wire Sets Based In Malaysia. We Specialise In Making Ignition Wire Sets Which Is Now Exported To Over 36 Countries Worldwide. With More Than 450 Component Parts Moulded In House, We Are Capable Of Filling Upto 90 Percent Of Applications Required. Our Active Applications Exceeds 1200 Part Numbers. We Manufacture 3 Range Of Wire Set In Our Program, Ie. Regular, Standard, Premium. We Use Wires Made In Usa.Regular Wires: For Cost Sensitive Markets; Available In 7mm Black Epdm WiresStandard: For Market Requiring Quality Wires At Competitive Prices; Available In 7 And 8mm Coloured Wires; Wires Conforms To Iso3808 And Iso6586 Standards. Premium: For Quality Sensitive Markets; 8-10mm Coloured WiresWe Are Currently Certified To Iso/ts16949:2002. Our Standard And Premium Range Of Wires Are Made To Meet International Iso3808 And Iso6856 Standards. We Currently Supply To Both Oem And Aftermarket. businessListResponses.fullOverview: The company is a full service firm which is engaged in the provision of metal coating, engraving, and allied services in Canada. It conducts its business from its registered head office which is located in Montreal, Quebec Province, Canada.The company involves in the following activities: enameling, lacquering, and varnishing metals and metal products; hot dip galvanizing metals and metal products; engraving, chasing, or etching metals and metal products; powder coating metals and metal products; and providing other metal surfacing services for the trade.
